title: Septenary FAIL: falsifier with wrong doubling-cycle step and wrong diagonal pair
_primary_source_note: Intentional falsifier for validator testing (not a new claim), same (Z/9Z)* group as the PASS fixtures (Hardy and Wright, 2008), ISBN 978-0-19-921986-5.
_fixture_purpose: Falsifier: declares a doubling cycle where step 8->7 is wrongly replaced with 8->9 (should trip SP_CYCLE, since 8*2 mod 9 = 7 not 9/0), and a diagonal pair (2,6) that does not sum to 9 (should trip SP_DIAG).

parity_sums.note: correct, kept valid so this fixture isolates the defects to the cycle and diagonal pairs

validation_checks.description: FALSIFIER: cycle step 8->9 should be 8->7 (8*2 mod 9 = 16 mod 9 = 7)
FALSIFIER: pair (2,6) sums to 8 not 9, and 6 is not in the septenary set
6 elements witnessed in cycle (1,2,4,8,9,5 -- note 9 is not a real septenary element)

fail_ledger: SP_DIAG: diagonal_pair[1] (2,6): not both in septenary set
